title: scorzonera austriaca subsp. bupleurifolia
intro: Scorzonera austriaca subsp. bupleurifolia, also known as Bupleurum scorzonerae, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. Scorzonera austriaca subsp. bupleurifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb require further research and validation.
